description: Frozen benchmark seed set for eval harness. DO NOT EDIT after freeze.

prompts.query: We are launching a B2B SaaS tool for mid-market HR teams. What positioning strategy would differentiate us from established players like BambooHR and Rippling?
Our email open rates dropped 30% after switching ESPs. What diagnostic framework should we use to identify root cause and recovery plan?
Design a content marketing funnel for a developer tools startup targeting senior engineers who distrust marketing.
We have $5,000/month budget and need to generate 50 qualified leads for an enterprise cybersecurity product. What channel mix do you recommend?
How should we structure A/B tests for our pricing page when we only get 2,000 visitors per month?
Create a go-to-market messaging framework for a fintech app targeting freelancers who currently use spreadsheets for invoicing.
What metrics should we track to measure brand awareness growth for a pre-revenue consumer health startup?
Our competitor just raised $50M and is flooding paid channels. How should a bootstrapped company with strong organic presence respond?
Design a referral program for a subscription box service with 10,000 active subscribers and 4% monthly churn.
What is the most effective way to reposition a product that is perceived as enterprise-only to also appeal to SMBs?
We need to add multi-tenancy to a monolithic Django app serving 200 customers. What architecture approach minimizes migration risk?
Our mobile app has a 60% day-1 retention but 15% day-30. What product changes should we prioritize to improve long-term retention?
Design an MVP scope for an AI writing assistant targeting non-native English speakers in professional settings. We have 3 engineers and 8 weeks.
How should we approach migrating from REST to GraphQL for a product with 50+ API consumers and no versioning strategy?
Our feature flag system has grown to 400+ flags with no cleanup process. What is the most pragmatic path to managing this technical debt?
We want to add real-time collaboration to our document editor. What are the key architectural tradeoffs between OT and CRDT approaches?
How should we structure a product team of 12 engineers across 3 squads to minimize coordination overhead while shipping a platform rewrite?
Our SaaS platform needs SOC 2 Type II compliance within 6 months. What product and engineering changes should we prioritize?
Design an instrumentation strategy for a checkout flow that has a 70% cart abandonment rate but no event tracking.
We are building a plugin marketplace for our SaaS product. What governance model balances developer freedom with platform stability?
We want to partner with Shopify to integrate our inventory management tool. What is the best approach to initiate and structure this partnership?
A Fortune 500 company wants to white-label our product. What deal terms and guardrails should we negotiate to protect our brand?
How should a seed-stage startup approach outbound to enterprise accounts when we have no case studies or brand recognition?
We are expanding from the US to Germany. What are the top 5 market-entry risks and how should we sequence our go-to-market?
Design a channel partner program for a cybersecurity startup targeting MSPs. We have budget for 3 pilot partners.
A competitor is acquiring one of our integration partners. What defensive and offensive moves should we consider?
How should we structure a revenue-share deal with a consulting firm that wants to resell our analytics platform to their clients?
We received inbound interest from 3 potential acquirers while still pre-Series A. How should we evaluate and respond without derailing our fundraise?
Design an enterprise pilot program that converts to paid contracts. Our product is a data pipeline tool and average deal size target is $50K ARR.
A large customer wants exclusivity in their vertical for 2 years. Under what conditions, if any, should we agree?
